label: Payer TIN Type
description: SSN or EIN

label: Payer Taxpayer ID Number
description: Enter the 9-digit TIN without dashes.

validations.errorMessage: TIN must be exactly 9 digits in length.
TIN cannot consist of the same digit repeated.

label: Payer Business Name Line 1
alternateMatches: Payer Business or Entity Name Line 1
description: One of either Payer Business Name or Payer Person Name is required.

validations.errorMessage: Must contain only letters, numbers, #, -, (, ), &, or apostrophe, with no leading/trailing/adjacent spaces.

label: Payer Business Name Line 2
alternateMatches: Payer Business or Entity Name Line 2

validations.errorMessage: Must contain only letters, numbers, #, -, (, ), &, or apostrophe, with no leading/trailing/adjacent spaces.

label: Payer First Name
description: One of either Payer Business Name or Payer Person Name is required.

validations.errorMessage: Must contain only letters, numbers, hyphens, or apostrophes.
Must contain only letters, numbers, hyphens, or apostrophes.
Must contain only letters, numbers, hyphens, or apostrophes.
Must contain only letters, numbers, hyphens, or apostrophes.

label: Payer Country
description: Must be a valid 2-character IRS country code (e.g., US, CA)

options.label: (SX) South Georgia & South Sandwich Islands
alternateMatches: South Georgia and South Sandwich Islands

validations.errorMessage: City must contain only letters, spaces, hyphens, apostrophes, or periods.

label: Payer State/Province/Territory
description:
Domestic: must be a valid US state/territory code (e.g., NY, TX).
Foreign: Must be 17 characters or fewer.

label: Payer ZIP/Postal Code
description:
Domestic: zip, zip+4, or zip+7.
Foreign: Alpha-numeric characters only

validations.errorMessage: Submitting a Payer without a phone number result in an 'Accepted with Errors' status

label: Office Code
description: This is an optional field. For users with multiple locations, this field may be used to identify the location of the office submitting the information returns.

validations.errorMessage: Office Code must be exactly 4 digits.

label: Recipient TIN Type
description: SSN, EIN, ATIN, ITIN, QI-EIN, or UND

validations.errorMessage: Recipients with blank TIN Types will be submitted as "UND" (Unknown).

label: Recipient Taxpayer ID Number
description: Enter the 9-digit TIN without dashes.

validations.errorMessage: TIN must be exactly 9 digits in length.
TIN cannot consist of the same digit repeated.
Submitting Recipients without a TIN will result in an 'Accepted with Errors' status
The composite Recipient TIN + Account Number must be unique

label: Recipient Account Number
description: The account number is required if you have multiple accounts for a recipient for whom you are filing more than one Form 1099-NEC.

validations.errorMessage: The composite Recipient TIN + Account Number must be unique
